overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a player walking through a dark rural field at night with a flashlight, approaching a log cabin with a campfire. The scene transitions from open wilderness to a cozy cabin area with a fire pit, ending with a view of a distant valley settlement.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through dark field with flashlight illuminating the path ahead

entered.detail: wooden log cabin with lit windows visible in the distance
dark mountain range silhouetted against the night sky
tall wooden utility poles with power lines stretching across the field
large boulder sitting in the grassy field
solitary tree with sparse autumn foliage

segments.scene_description: Walking through open grassland at night toward a distant log cabin. The flashlight illuminates the dirt path ahead while utility poles and mountains are visible against the starry sky.

events.description: approaching the wooden information kiosk and cabin structure

agents.ego_description: approaching the cabin and passing the information board on the left

entered.detail: wooden information board with posters and maps under a small roof
stack of cut firewood next to the cabin

segments.scene_description: Approaching the log cabin and passing a wooden information kiosk with posters. The large rock falls behind as the cabin grows larger in view and a wood pile becomes visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: cabin yard with campfire and seating

events.description: approaching the campfire, warm firelight mixes with flashlight illumination
slowing and panning around the campfire area to view surroundings

agents.ego_description: approaching the campfire and examining the cabin surroundings

entered.detail: stone fire pit with burning logs and rising smoke
rustic wooden log benches arranged around the fire pit

segments.scene_description: Reaching the campfire area in front of the log cabin. The warm glow of the fire illuminates wooden benches and a wood pile as the camera circles the area.

events.description: panning away from cabin to view the distant valley and settlement lights

agents.ego_description: turning to observe the distant valley and settlement lights

entered.detail: wide valley with rolling hills visible in the moonlight
twinkling lights from a distant town or settlement in the valley

segments.scene_description: Panning away from the campfire to reveal a wide valley view with distant settlement lights twinkling in the darkness. The cabin recedes into the background as the camera focuses on the expansive night landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dark, open wilderness toward the warm sanctuary of a rural cabin and an expansive valley vista. It begins with a flashlight cutting through the night as the camera moves along a dirt path through grassland, with utility poles and mountains silhouetted against a starry sky. As the camera advances, the path leads past a wooden information kiosk and a large rock, bringing the log cabin and a nearby wood pile into clear view. The scene then shifts into the warm, flickering glow of a campfire area, circling around wooden benches and the cabin's entrance. Finally, the camera pans away from the fire to reveal a wide valley where the distant lights of a settlement twinkle in the darkness, leaving the cabin behind to focus on the vast night landscape.
